title: leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides
intro: Leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides, also known as the oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. ceratophylloides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
